question: What is the order of the three trips I took in the past three months, from earliest to latest?
gold_answer: I went on a day hike to Muir Woods National Monument with my family, then I went on a road trip with friends to Big Sur and Monterey, and finally I started my solo camping trip to Yosemite National Park.
prediction: Yosemite road trip, Big Sur and Monterey road trip, Yosemite solo camping trip
reasoning_summary: Identified three trips from evidence: Yosemite road trip (source 65, memory m_d1cf...), Big Sur/Monterey road trip (source 207, memory m_5ed5...), and Yosemite solo camping trip (source 225, memory m_3c9d...). Ordered chronologically by their dates: 2023-02-20, 2023-04-20, 2023-05-15.
